title: BBL Colors
description: Adds various new decoration block and spray cans to color blocks in world!
body:
# __**BBL Colors**__

## **__Overview__**

**BBL Colors** is a vibrant and expansive Minecraft mod designed to enhance your creative builds with an extensive variety of decorative blocks. Whether you're constructing a cozy cabin, a modern cityscape, or a mystical forest retreat, this mod provides endless possibilities to bring your vision to life.

Some Blocks have connected texture using a custom resource pack found here;
[Colors Resource Pack ](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bbl-colors-connected-textures)


BBL Colors introduces an impressive selection of new blocks to diversify your builds, including:

*   **Colorful Planks** – Perfect for adding bright, dynamic wooden structures.
    
*   **Bamboo Blocks** – Natural yet vibrant options for a tropical touch.
    
*   **Stones and Rocks** – Ideal for realistic pathways, castle walls, or underground designs.
    
*   **Dirt Variations** – Unique textures and colors for immersive landscaping.
    
*   **Tree Dirt** – Specialized blocks that blend seamlessly with natural forests.
    
*   **And Much More** – Discover an array of other unique textures and color options to expand your creative toolkit.
    

One of the standout features of BBL Colors is the intuitive **spray can system**, allowing players to convert blocks directly in the world without the need to break and replace them. This convenient tool makes it simple to experiment with different colors and textures on the fly, giving you total control over your designs with minimal effort.

Whether you're a seasoned builder or just starting your creative journey, BBL Colors offers user-friendly mechanics and an expansive block palette to help you achieve your desired aesthetic. With so many options at your fingertips, the possibilities are endless.

## __**Support**__

Join the BBL [Discord](https://discord.gg/benbenlaw) for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/benbenlaw) to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
